caption: STOP scrolling if you’re missing Home-style Bengali food in Namma Bengaluru! ✨ ​Finally found a hidden gem that serves Pabda Fish Thali and Kosha Mangsho that actually tastes like it’s straight from a Ma'er kitchen.  ​Why you need to visit: ​Authentic Flavors: From Egg Devil to Phulkopi Dalna, the taste is 10\/10. ​Rare Finds: It’s so hard to find fresh Pabda in Bangalore, but they’ve nailed it! ​Budget Friendly: Massive portions that won't break the bank. ​The Vibe: Warm hospitality by a Siliguri-born owner. ​ Calcutta Culture, Sarjapur, Bangalore Tag that friend who is always craving Luchi! ‍♂️ #BangaloreFoodies #BengaliFoodBangalore #NammaBengaluru #BangaloreEats #BangaloreRestaurants #KolkataFood #KoshaMangsho #PabdaFish #BangaloreFoodBlogger #HiddenGemsBangalore #BengaliCuisine #BangaloreFoodGuide #newinbangalore

1️⃣ Day 1 - Biryani Series  We kickstarted our Biryani Series with the iconic Kolkata Biryani—yes, the one with that legendary aalu! Found a hidden gem with a 4.5-star rating and had to try it. Rich spices, one juicy chicken piece, soft potato, and a burst of authentic Bengali flavors. A must-try for every biryani lover in Bangalore! Follow for more hidden food spots and regional flavours! Full video on YouTube—link in bio! #biryani #kolkatabiryani #kolkata #calcutta #bengali #bengalifood #bengalireels #bangla #bangalore #bangalorefoodies #foodiesofinstagram #couplegoals #foodblogger #weekendvibes #saturday #vibes

Hidden Gem Alert in Koramangala  Move over Bob’s Bar  – there’s a new budget king in town! ✨ Say hello to Sathyas Bar – cheap booze, big portions & pure Bangalore vibes.  Be ready for the queues, but trust me, it’s worth every sip & bite!   Tag your squad & plan the next budget adda here! #BangaloreDiaries #KoramangalaVibes #BudgetFriendly #NammaBengaluru #HiddenGemBangalore #CheapThrills #BangaloreFoodies #PubHoppingBangalore #BangaloreReels #SathyasBar

If you’re a true mango lover in Bangalore, this is your sign to visit Mahadevapura’s Mango Utsava this weekend ✨ 100+ mango dishes, fresh mangoes directly from farmers, live music, flea market shopping, kids play area & unlimited vibes!  Whitefield is officially smelling like mango season  #MangoFestival #WhitefieldBangalore #BangaloreEvents #MangoLover #ThingsToDoInBangalore

The 1,000-year-old secret you’ve been driving right past… ​Everyone wakes up at 4 AM to catch the sunrise at Nandi Hills, but 90% of people completely miss the ancient masterpiece sitting right at the bottom. ​Built originally in the 9th century, the Sri Bhoga Nandishwara Gudi isn't just an architectural marvel—it’s a living energy center. If you look closely at the pillars, you can see the distinct craftsmanship of five different empires (including the Cholas and Hoysalas). ​ ​ Distance: ~60km from Bangalore (perfect for a morning ride). ⏰ Best time to visit: Arrive by 7:30 AM before the crowd hits and the sun gets too harsh. ​ ​#BhogaNandishwara #BangaloreTravel #NandiHills #KarnatakaTourism #BangaloreDiaries HiddenGemsIndia IncredibleIndia ExploreKarnataka

An OG Bangalore spot whose reviews seem to be going down lately — but honestly, Chef Bakers surprised us ✨ Tried the Brookefield outlet and most of the food was actually really good. The Chicken Cajun grilled sandwich, chicken patty and mushroom omelette were definitely above average and worth trying  Good comfort food, cozy vibes and a solid café stop when those cravings hit  If you’re around Brookefield, this outlet is worth checking out! #ChefBakers #Brookefield #BangaloreFoodie #BangaloreCafe #viralreels BangaloreEats NammaBengaluru FoodReels ComfortFood SandwichLover BangaloreDiaries
